channel.title: Kevin's Morning Briefing
channel.description: Daily morning briefing with news, weather, travel destinations, and scripture. Delivered fresh every morning at 5:30 AM CST by your AI assistant Viktor.
channel.itunes:author: Viktor - AI Assistant
channel.itunes:summary: Start your day informed and inspired with a personalized morning briefing covering local Tulsa news, national headlines, world events, tech updates, travel destinations, and daily scripture.

item.title: Morning Briefing - March 16, 2026
item.description: Today's briefing includes local Tulsa news, national headlines from NPR and Reuters, world events from BBC, tech updates from TechMeme and Hacker News, plus your travel destination (Reykjavik, Iceland) and daily scripture (Proverbs 16:9).
